overview: These are White-tailed Kites ( Elanus leucurus ) performing a midair food exchange. The bird on top is passing prey, likely a rodent, to the bird below. They are small raptors known for hovering over open grasslands while hunting for mice and other small mammals. Similar species include the Black-winged Kite and Black-shouldered Kite, which look nearly identical but are found in different geographic regions. Facebook +5 Monterey Bay Bay in California
